_comment: CROSS-REPO PARITY FIXTURE. This file MUST be byte-identical at tests/fixtures/compose_parity.json in both qontinui-supervisor and qontinui-coord. qontinui-supervisor/src/cache_key.rs::compose and qontinui-coord/src/ac_gate.rs::compose must each produce `expected_key` from `inputs`. The coord AC-freshness gate looks keys up in the same bazel-remote Action Cache the supervisor pool writes; if either compose() drifts, the lookups miss every entry the pool wrote and the optimization silently degrades to a permanent 0% hit rate. Changing serialization, field order, or hash construction in EITHER compose() requires updating BOTH implementations AND regenerating expected_key here, in lockstep, in the same change window. See memory proj_row_10_item_8_ac_gate.
